commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh You have given us like sheep appointed for food; and have scattered us among the nations. Augustine of Hippo 10. "Thou has given us like sheep appointed for meat, and hast scattered us among the nations" (ver. We have been "devoured" by "the nations. " Those persons are meant, who, through their sufferings, have by process of assimilation, becomes part of the "body" of the Gentile world. For the Church mourns over them, as over members of her body, that have been devoured.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Nations. Many never returned from captivity. (Calmet) See Deuteronomy xxviii. 43.
